title: Billionaire Investor Says 'Sell Real Estate'
text: Billionaire Charlie Munger recently warned investors. He said that commercial real estate is facing severe challenges.

title: Debunking Common Myths From REIT Bulls
text: Equity REITs are widely preferred by retail investors mainly due to attractive dividend yields and simple business models. The underlying simplicity creates favorable dynamics for REIT analysts to also apply superficial analysis and many heuristics to support their bull thesis.

title: 5 'Strong Buy' REITs With A Wide Margin Of Safety
text: It took some very tough lessons in life before I emerged with a mindset and determination to seek value without taking on excessive risks. While these hardships remain a distant memory, they're constant reminders that define the traits of my investment strategy today.

title: Alexandria (ARE) Boosts Asset Recycling Strategy With $86M Sale
text: Capitalizing on robust market valuations, Alexandria (ARE) propels its asset recycling strategy, selling a San Diego cluster property for $86 million.

title: Buy REITs When There's Blood In The Streets
text: There are certainly some issues facing REITs right now. REITs also enjoy many advantages and strengths that the market seems to be ignoring.

title: Fed Hawks and Doves Send Conflicting Signals
If I Were Starting Over In My 20s, I Would Buy These REITs
text: I teach frequently at many colleges and universities, lecturing on the topic of REITs as I really enjoy teaching students the benefits of owning real estate stocks. So far this year, I've lectured at Penn State, University of North Carolina, NYU, and Clemson University, and I look forward to launching my very own REIT Masterclass this summer.

title: Why I Stopped Buying Treasuries To Buy REITs Instead
text: Treasuries now offer a 5.5% yield. Many investors are turning to Treasuries for safety.

title: Alexandria Real Estate: Expensive And Not As Safe As You Think
text: Alexandria Real Estate is seen as a very safe REIT due to its pure life science exposure and fortress balance sheet. I think the bulls are ignoring some very real risks and not focusing enough on valuation.

title: Alexandria Real Estate: Unfairly Punished
text: Over the last two months, ARE fell by 15% as a result of a collapse of SVB and a general office REIT selloff. I believe neither of these is significant to ARE's long-term performance, and following stellar Q1 results, I upgrade the company to a strong buy.

title: Getting Ready For A 'Higher-For-Longer' Scenario For REITs
text: In the past decade, many REITs have become complacent and devised aggressive financing strategies that were underpinned by low interest rates. The sudden shift in the interest rates and a probability of a "higher-for-longer" scenario can put a notable share of REITs in a "nuclear winter" territory in my view.

title: 4 Dividend Stocks Yielding 4%+ to Buy Right Now for Loads of Passive Income
text: Lower stock prices are pushing up dividend yields. Several high-quality companies currently offer yields above 4%.

title: Inflation Cools, But Nobody Believes It
text: U.S. equity markets finished lower for a second-straight week as data showing an encouraging cooldown of inflationary pressures was offset by ongoing regional bank instability and an unresolved debt ceiling standoff. Declining for a second week after ending April at its highest levels of the year, the S&P 500 slipped 0.3% on the week, but the tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 gained nearly 1%.

title: Why I Stopped Buying REITs To Buy Rental Properties Instead
text: REITs are better investments than rental properties in most cases. But there are exceptions.

title: Winners Of REIT Earnings Season
text: You wouldn't know it by reading the mainstream financial press, but there's more to commercial real estate than office buildings. Obscured by office pain, REITs delivered surprisingly strong first quarter results. Of the 83 equity REITs that provide full-year Funds from Operations ("FFO") guidance, 37 (44%) raised their full-year earnings outlook, while 5 (6%) lowered guidance.

title: Billionaire Investors Buying REITs With Both Hands
text: Steve Schwartzman and John Gray are self-made billionaires. They are buying REITs through Blackstone Inc.

title: 10 REITs For The Long Haul
text: No junk. No terrible REITs with excess leverage hoping to support a fat yield. These REITs compound wealth for investors over the long haul.

title: Sell Alert: 2 REITs Getting Risky
text: Many REITs are today very opportunistic. But not all of them are.

title: Important Message For REIT Investors
text: REITs can be very rewarding investments. But many investors fail to fully appreciate their returns.
